headline: National Council debates lifting Switzerland's new-nuclear ban
summary: Swiss lower house holds a marathon summer-session debate on permitting new nuclear plants.

headline: Canton Vaud braces for G7 summit with counter-espionage and protests
summary: Vaud mounts an unprecedented security mobilisation ahead of a G7 summit on its territory.

headline: Swiss right and employers split on ratifying ILO workplace-harassment convention
summary: Ratification of ILO Convention 190 on workplace harassment stalls amid right/employer opposition.

headline: Valais parliament backs emergency aid for Crans-Montana fire victims
summary: Valais cantonal MPs voice broad support for victims of the Crans-Montana fire disaster despite UDC reservations.

headline: Swiss report: connected devices weaponised in domestic violence
summary: Le Temps reports IoT/connected objects increasingly used as tools of domestic abuse in Switzerland.

headline: Israel pushes deeper into Lebanon as Iran ceasefire frays
summary: Israel escalates in Lebanon, framed as the breaking point for the Iran-war ceasefire; Iran touts a strategic-doctrine shift after a Beirut-area raid.

headline: IAEA chief says Iran-US nuclear talks in 'complicated phase'
summary: IAEA director Grossi says Iran-US nuclear negotiations have entered a complicated phase.

headline: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang, pledges support to Kim Jong-un
summary: Chinese leader Xi Jinping makes a state visit to North Korea and assures Kim Jong-un of support.

headline: Pashinyan claims 'historic victory' countering Moscow in Armenia
summary: Armenian PM Nikol Pashinyan secures a win seen as reducing Russian influence.

headline: At least 11 killed in Pakistan-administered Kashmir clashes
summary: Clashes before a rally in Pakistan-administered Kashmir leave at least 11 dead.

headline: Russia rations diesel and petrol despite owning refineries
summary: Russian government imposes fuel rationing despite domestic refining capacity.

headline: Meta to sue Israeli spyware maker NSO Group
summary: Meta announces legal action against NSO Group over spyware targeting its platforms.

headline: CVE-2026-46442: Flowise auth gap lets any user run JS (RCE)
summary: Flowise LLM-flow builder missing route-level auth on custom-function endpoint enables remote code execution; fixed in 3.1.2.

headline: Routinator RPKI validator hit by DoS and path-traversal CVEs
summary: NLnet Labs Routinator RPKI relying-party software has multiple crash/path-traversal flaws (CVE-2026-49232/49233/49234/49235).

headline: VMware Cloud Foundation Operations stored XSS (CVE-2026-41722)
summary: Broadcom advisory: multiple stored XSS in VMware Cloud Foundation Operations let privileged users run admin actions.

headline: CVE-2026-47430: cordova-plugin-inappbrowser iOS command injection
summary: Apache Cordova InAppBrowser iOS plugin lets loaded web content invoke arbitrary native callbacks (CVSS 9.5).

headline: Checkmk XSS and URL-validation bypass (CVE-2026-8833/7186)
summary: Checkmk monitoring has stored XSS and URL-validation bypass enabling javascript: URI injection.

headline: LightningLM: 120B sparse MoE trained on a single 8-GPU node
summary: Reversible state-preserving scaling grows a 120B MoE from a small seed on one node.

headline: Sparsely gated tiny linear experts (sgatlin)
summary: MoE with single-neuron linear experts and no nonlinearity improves compute efficiency and interpretability.

headline: On the Geometry of On-Policy Distillation
summary: Characterises on-policy distillation training dynamics vs SFT and RLVR in parameter space.

headline: ViSAE: concept circuits for interpreting and steering Vision Transformers
summary: Neuroscience-motivated sparse-autoencoder toolbox for ViT mechanistic interpretability.

headline: Performance Variation in Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: Proposes percentile-based statistics to report run-to-run variation in deep RL.

headline: TRUST: uncertainty-aligned RL for agent tool-calling decisions
summary: RL method aligning uncertainty to reduce overconfident tool-use and hallucinated responses in LLM agents.
